mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ics_room r WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.park_id = #{parkId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_customer c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.status = '0'
AND c.park_id = #{parkId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_contract c WHERE COALESCE(c.del_flag, '0') = '0' AND c.contract_status = '1' AND c.end_date >= CURDATE() AND c.end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL IFNULL(c.renewal_remind_days, 30) DAY)
AND c.park_id = #{parkId}
